batch_metadata.note: Phase C. Three-block data structure. Row numbers non-sequential per B-027+ protocol.

primary_flags.summary: Comprehensive complaint relay — Olivia's household experience delivered as co-parenting pressure document. ROW-14839 (Nov 24, 2:48 PM): Melissa relays a sustained compilation of Olivia's stated experiences at Eli's household: 'She's communicated to you that she doesn't like to constantly fight with Milo, felt bad about Abby calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad, Abby saying that I'm mean and Milo shit talking me all the time. That stuff makes her unhappy. That along with feeling like she doesn't have her own room because Alice took it over makes her feel unwelcome. We've communicated that to you. Unless you change something and make her feel better she's probably not going to change how she feels about going.' Key RF-08 mechanisms: (1) Olivia's reported emotional experience relayed as a comprehensive complaint document; (2) Abby framed as the source of Olivia's distress ('Abby calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad') — consistent with CP2 ADD-004 Abby behavioral loyalty coaching; (3) household displacement framing ('doesn't have her own room because Alice took it over'); (4) conditional compliance framing: Olivia's parenting-plan attendance conditional on Eli satisfying Olivia's complaints — Olivia positioned as arbiter of her own schedule. Context: arrives the morning after the third consecutive visit refusal (Nov 18, Nov 21, Nov 24). Cross-reference RF-04 B-029-006 (inadequate-father mega-cluster).
exact_quotes: ROW-14839 (Received, full): 'She\'s communicated to you that she doesn\'t not like to constantly fight with Milo, felt bad about Abby calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad, Abby saying that I\'m mean and Milo shit talking me all the time. That stuff makes her unhappy. That along with feeling like she doesn\'t have her own room because Alice took it over makes her feel unwelcome. We\'ve communicated that to you. Unless you change something and make her feel better she\'s probably not going to change how she feels about going.'
primary_flags.rf08_mechanism: Comprehensive complaint relay: Olivia's reported household experience compiled into a multi-grievance document and delivered as conditional-compliance pressure. Olivia positioned as both the source of the complaint inventory and the decision-maker for future compliance.
primary_flags.abby_add004_note: ROW-14839's Abby component ('Abby calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad') is consistent with ADD-004 Abby behavioral loyalty coaching — Olivia reports Abby's behavior through Melissa's relay, which mirrors the coached perception Eli noted at CP2 Q5 (confusion about Abby not behaving as expected).

arc_state_snapshot.note: ARC-RF08-001 ACTIVE: 10 signals. Phase C. S010 is the most comprehensive relay document in the dataset — Olivia's household experience compiled into a conditional-compliance demand. Visit refusal cascade context (Nov 18/21/24 refusals).

compound_patterns.description: Comprehensive complaint relay compounds with RF-04 inadequate-father mega-cluster (RF04-B029-006): RF-08 contributes the triangulation mechanism (Olivia as complaint-document source and conditional-compliance arbiter); RF-04 contributes the emotional manipulation and inadequate-father framing. Abby-harmful-actor sub-component consistent with ADD-004.

batch_observations.tone_assessment: Phase C. Oct-Dec 2025. Third consecutive visit refusal context. S010 is the most comprehensive relay document in the dataset.
batch_observations.rf08_assessment: One Sev-2 primary flag. ROW-14839 represents the relay mechanism at its most developed: Olivia's experience compiled into a multi-grievance complaint document, framed as both a statement of Olivia's position and a conditional demand on Eli. The Abby component ('calling her a bad sister and you a bad dad') is the clearest relay instance of the coached Abby-loyalty dynamic noted at CP2.
batch_observations.cross_rf_context: RF-04 compound. The ROW-14839 cluster is the RF-04 pass's 'most comprehensive inadequate-father/Abby-harmful-actor/family-displacement child relay.' RF-08 classifies the triangulation mechanism; RF-04 classifies the emotional manipulation content.
